action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Miresse, Anderson, Arney, Bare, DeSmidt, Hong, Joers, Madison, McCarville, Moore Omokunde, Neubauer, Palmeri, Roe, Stroud, Subeck, Taylor, Tenorio, Udell and Vining; 
cosponsored by Senators Roys, Dassler-Alfheim, L. Johnson, Larson, Pfaff, Ratcliff, Smith and Spreitzer
